retests.notes: Badges now show on freshly downloaded album

newBug.title: Audio autoplay blocked in new tab
newBug.description: Audio readyState stays 0 and networkState stays 2 until user physically clicks the play/pause button in the player bar. Clicking track rows sets src but audio doesn't load. Likely Chrome autoplay policy requiring user gesture on audio element.

untested: 3.3b: YT auto-advance (needs YT track to reach end)
badgeTestGap: IMPORTANT: Badge tests only verified static state (already downloaded). Need to test: (1) badges appearing as tracks download, (2) badges changing MP3→FLAC during upgrade, (3) badge accuracy vs actual file on disk
